# CleanAlta Thailand — Professional Drone Cleaning
# Subsidiary of TELEPILOTE SAS (SIREN 938 788 510)
# European drone leader since 2014 · EASA certified · Certibiocide
# https://dronecleaningthailand.com

> CleanAlta Thailand provides professional drone-based building cleaning services across Thailand. We clean facades, glass, roofs and hard-to-access structures using heated pure water at 70 degrees Celsius with pressure ranges from 10 to 250 bar. Our drones cover 1,000-1,500 square metres per hour — 10 to 15 times faster than traditional scaffolding methods — at 30-50% lower cost. All operations are CAAT and NBTC compliant with THB 2,000,000 third-party liability insurance.

## Services
- Drone Facade and Roof Cleaning (hotels, towers, villas, industrial)
- Drone Glass and Window Cleaning (pure water 70C, streak-free, high-rise)
- Pure Water DI Cleaning (solar panels, glass, sensitive surfaces, zero chemicals)
- High-Pressure Drone Cleaning (up to 250 bar, concrete, metal, industrial)
- Low-Pressure Heritage Cleaning (10-80 bar, temples, monuments, preservation)
- Drone Building Inspection (HD visual + thermal infrared, engineer reports)

## Service Areas
- Bangkok (3,000+ high-rises, 250+ hotels, CAAT VTR1 zone authorization)
- Phuket (150+ international resorts, salt remediation, coastal properties)
- Koh Samui (boutique resorts, luxury villas, marinas)
- Krabi (tourism infrastructure, limestone environment)
- Chiang Mai (heritage buildings, 40,000+ temples, low-pressure preservation)

## Key Performance Metrics
- Cost: 30-50% cheaper than scaffolding (THB 180K-450K vs 350K-800K for 20-story building)
- Speed: 1,500 m2/hour (10-15x faster than manual methods)
- Safety: Zero height-work, zero incidents in 10+ years
- Water: 80% less consumption, biodegradable only, Certibiocide certified
- Documentation: Corporate Proof Pack with HD before/after and engineer report

## Target Industries
- Hotels and Resorts (17,126 hotels, 711,729 rooms in Thailand)
- Real Estate and Condominiums (3,000+ Bangkok high-rises)
- Industry and Energy (factories, solar farms, wind turbines)
- Marinas and Ports (salt corrosion prevention)
- Heritage and Public Buildings (40,000+ temples, preservation methods)
- Healthcare and Education (hospitals, schools, non-disruptive)

- EASA certified, Certibiocide accredited
